articles.title: Boston runner to take on 2026 Marathon for Corey C. Griffin Foundation
articles.description:
Annie Yardley was "not an athlete before this." Now, she's gearing up to run the Boston Marathon for the Corey C. Griffin Foundation.

The post Boston runner to take on 2026 Marathon for Corey C. Griffin Foundation appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Annie Yardley, a Boston resident, prepares to run the 2026 Marathon.
She supports the Corey C. Griffin Foundation, promoting local community initiatives.
Yardley's journey inspires others in Boston to engage in fitness and philanthropy.

articles.title: Cape Cod man charged with sister’s murder
articles.description:
Kenneth Beltrame was expected to be arraigned Wednesday in Barnstable District Court. His sister, Jennifer Beltrame, was 61.

The post Cape Cod man charged with sister’s murder appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kenneth Beltrame charged with the murder of his 61-year-old sister, Jennifer Beltrame.
Arraignment scheduled for Wednesday at Barnstable District Court.
This incident raises concerns about domestic violence in Cape Cod communities.

articles.title: No one can use a gas-powered leaf blower in these 2 Mass. towns, thanks to new laws
articles.description:
Arlington and Lexington restrict use to electric models, citing noise and environmental concerns.

The post No one can use a gas-powered leaf blower in these 2 Mass. towns, thanks to new laws appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Arlington and Lexington ban gas-powered leaf blowers, promoting electric alternatives.
New laws address noise and environmental concerns effective immediately.
Residents must transition to electric models, impacting landscaping services and homeowners.

articles.title: Fenway Park offers 4 new food concessions, including lobster poutine
articles.description:
Aramark announced the new concessions ahead of Red Sox Opening Day on Thursday.

The post Fenway Park offers 4 new food concessions, including lobster poutine appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Aramark introduces four new food concessions at Fenway Park for Red Sox Opening Day.
New offerings include lobster poutine, enhancing dining options for fans.
Changes aim to improve the game day experience for Boston residents attending games.

articles.title: 3 arrested in ‘highly coordinated’ break-in scheme that targeted Indian, East Asian residents
articles.description:
The “sophisticated” crime ring allegedly made off with vast amounts of cash, jewelry, and heirlooms, according to Middlesex District Attorney Marian Ryan.

The post 3 arrested in ‘highly coordinated’ break-in scheme that targeted Indian, East Asian residents appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Three suspects arrested for a coordinated break-in targeting Indian and East Asian residents.
The crime ring stole significant amounts of cash, jewelry, and heirlooms, according to DA Marian Ryan.
Residents are urged to enhance security measures following these targeted home invasions.

articles.title: Here’s where experts rank the Red Sox entering the 2026 season
articles.description:
Boston lands in the top 10 across most preseason MLB power rankings.

The post Here’s where experts rank the Red Sox entering the 2026 season appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox rank in the top 10 of MLB preseason power rankings for 2026.
Experts highlight Boston's strong roster and potential for playoff contention.
Local fans can expect an exciting season with increased ticket demand.

articles.title: Report: Celtics signing Charles Bassey to another 10-day contract
articles.description:
Bassey has earned some more time with the Celtics.

The post Report: Celtics signing Charles Bassey to another 10-day contract appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics sign Charles Bassey to a 10-day contract effective March 25, 2026.
Bassey aims to contribute to the team's playoff push this season.
Local fans anticipate increased bench depth and performance from Bassey.

articles.title: Speakers, performers announced for ‘No Kings’ Boston rally Saturday
articles.description:
Gov. Maura Healey, Milford student leader Marcelo Gomes da Silva, Rep. Ayanna Pressley, and Dropkick Murphys are among those set to appear at the rally.

The post Speakers, performers announced for ‘No Kings’ Boston rally Saturday appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Gov. Maura Healey and Rep. Ayanna Pressley will speak at the No Kings rally.
Milford student leader Marcelo Gomes da Silva and Dropkick Murphys are also performing.
The rally aims to engage Boston residents in local governance discussions.

articles.title: Report: Celtics executive Brad Stevens removes his name from UNC coaching search
articles.description:
UNC, the school that hired Bill Belichick, reportedly wanted to get Stevens, too.

The post Report: Celtics executive Brad Stevens removes his name from UNC coaching search appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics executive Brad Stevens withdraws from UNC coaching search as of March 2026.
UNC sought Stevens, who previously coached the Celtics, highlighting his local significance.
Stevens' decision ensures his continued leadership role with the Celtics, impacting Boston's basketball future.
